content: Can you do a series where you try a new AI tool every week? Like a proper ongoing thing
I love how honest you are — please never become one of those channels that only reviews stuff they're paid for
Would love a behind the scenes of your actual creative process — like how a video goes from idea to upload
Can you do 'AI tool for [specific creative job]' like AI tools for graphic designers, photographers etc
I'd pay for a course on your Notion setup but a free series would be amazing too
The before/after format is so satisfying — more of that please like 'I redesigned my whole workflow using only AI'
What about a series testing if AI can do your whole job for a week? Like replace each part of your workflow
Your cosy aesthetic is genuinely what keeps me coming back — the content could be about anything
More 'real talk' videos — the one where you admitted the AI Q&A was unreliable was so refreshing
Please do a series on building a creative business as a solo person — budgets, rates, client stuff
I want a series where you spend £50 on a different part of your setup each episode
The 'honest review' format is your superpower — lean into it more
Can you do a day in the life but with timestamps showing exactly how long each task takes?
Series idea: recreating a viral creator's setup on a budget
